heading: Additional report on other United States contributions to the United Nations
label: 287b–1 Additional report on other United States contributions to the United Nations
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of State Authorities Act, Fiscal Year 2017, and not as part of , , known as the United Nations Participation Act of 1945, which comprises this subchapter.act Dec. 20, 1945, ch. 58359 Stat. 619
amendments: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of State Authorities Act, Fiscal Year 2017, and not as part of , , known as the United Nations Participation Act of 1945, which comprises this subchapter.act Dec. 20, 1945, ch. 58359 Stat. 619

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , and annually thereafter, the Director of the Office of Management and Budget shall submit to Congress a report on all assessed and voluntary contributions with a value greater than $100,000, including in-kind, of the United States Government to the United Nations and its affiliated agencies and related bodies during the previous fiscal year.December 16, 2016

The total amount of all assessed and voluntary contributions, including in-kind, of the United States Government to the United Nations and its affiliated agencies and related bodies during the previous fiscal year.

The approximate percentage of United States Government contributions to each United Nations affiliated agency or body in such fiscal year when compared with all contributions to each such agency or body from any source in such fiscal year.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of each such contribution;

children.label: B
children.text: a description of each such contribution (including whether assessed or voluntary);

children.label: C
children.text: the department or agency of the United States Government responsible for each such contribution;

children.label: D
children.text: the purpose of each such contribution; and

children.label: E
children.text: the United Nations or its affiliated agency or related body receiving the contribution.

children.heading: Scope of initial report
children.label: c Scope of initial report
children.text: The first report required under subsection (a) shall include the information required under this section for the previous 3 fiscal years.

children.heading: Public availability of information
children.label: d Public availability of information
children.text: Not later than 14 days after submitting a report required under subsection (a), the Director of the Office of Management and Budget shall post a public version of such report on a text-based, searchable, and publicly available Internet Web site.
